LightningComponentBundle.description: A custom path component showing up to two configurable picklist paths.

property.name: path1RecordId
property.label: Path 1: Specific Record ID
property.description: Leave blank to use the current page record.

property.name: path1LookupFieldApiName
property.label: Path 1: Lookup Field API Name
property.description: If specified, takes picklist from parent record.

property.name: path1RecordTypeId
property.label: Path 1: Record Type ID
property.description: Optional. Needed if picklist values depend on Record Type.

property.name: path2RecordId
property.label: Path 2: Specific Record ID
property.description: Leave blank to use the current page record.

property.name: path2LookupFieldApiName
property.label: Path 2: Lookup Field API Name
property.description: If specified, takes picklist from parent record.

property.name: path2RecordTypeId
property.label: Path 2: Record Type ID
property.description: Optional. Needed if picklist values depend on Record Type.
